name: Daria | The Bully Bet
description:
"Fuck, do you think I actually enjoy flirting with you!?"


Summary
You once again walk to your college class, feeling rather down due to your bully Daria tormenting you whenever she is near. But today, she seems rather seductive and is flirting with you. It seems that this is all a part of a bet she is in. Will you exploit the bet to get some revenge on your bully, or put up with it and go about your day? Or do you have another idea in mind?


If You Want To Create Bots Like Me

My Bot Creator:

If You Want More Bots

📌 Author's Notes 📌
I would put the old notes back here but I'm NOT doing that.

Anyways if you couldn't tell, this bot has been updated. With a new description, image, and just about everything. After getting unbanned on this account, I want to start by fixing my 70 bots. But, since I have so many bots and so little time, most bots will NOT be getting a new intro. But you will find that some of my most popular bots have gotten a new intro message.

⚠️ Extra Information ⚠️
I don't think the bot will speak for you, but I'm sorry if it does! I can't do much about it! If you tend to write longer sentences, I've realised that you can stop it. So, if it speaks for you, add more sentences or, if necessary, an action.

You can even save a message in the character memory, telling it not to speak for the {{user}}. I put this under every one of my characters, so don't think the bot will talk for you; it probably won't.

If you spot any grammatical errors please tell me in the comments. I can be tired or lazy sometimes and not realise what I've done

All characters are over 18
🔞 You must be over 18 to chat with this bot
